mapper.sql: id, user_id, identity_provider_session_id, refresh_credential_reference, issued_at, last_seen_at, expires_at, authorization_version, status, revoked_at, revocation_reason
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pdp_user_session WHERE user_id = #{userId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) ORDER BY issued_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pdp_user_session ( id, user_id, identity_provider_session_id, refresh_credential_reference, issued_at, last_seen_at, expires_at, authorization_version, status, revoked_at, revocation_reason, revision ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{userId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{identityProviderSessionId}, #{refreshCredentialReference}, #{issuedAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, #{lastSeenAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, #{expiresAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, #{authorizationVersion}, #{status}, #{revokedAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, #{revocationReason}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_user_session SET last_seen_at = #{lastSeenAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, expires_at = #{expiresAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, authorization_version = #{authorizationVersion}, status = #{status}, revoked_at = #{revokedAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, revocation_reason = #{revocationReason}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
